title: Yaarai Polum Illa Neeyum Lyrics Pencil Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Pencil Yaarai Polum Illa Neeyum Song Lyrics
Singer: GV Prakash
Movie: Pencil

Yaarai polum illaa neeyum
Ellor polum ullla naalum
Andru sandhiththom
Adhai engu yaen tholaiththom.

Dhooraththil nee poga kandeney
Pakkaththil ne ennai kandaayaa

Paarkirom sirikkirom
Serndhu naam nadakkirom
Aththanai kaatchiyum
Karpanai, azhagaey.

Nee pona theru oram
Naan nindra naatkal pala.
Thirumbaadha un thalayum
Udhirthidumey pookkal sila.

Nee illaa neraththil
Odaadhu endhan kadikaara mull.
Enai paathu idhamaaga
Indrenum oru vaarthai Sol.

Yaarai polum illaa neeyum
Ellor polum ullla naalum
Andru sandhiththom
Adhai engu yaen tholaiththom.

Dhooraththil nee poga kandeney
Pakkaththil ne ennai kandaayaa

Paarkirom sirikkirom
Serndhu naam nadakkirom
Aththanai kaatchiyum
Karpanai, azhagaey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and connection, highlighting the joy of being together.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Pencil, the song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by GV Prakash Kumar, showcasing his talent in both areas.

When was the song released?

Yaarai Polum Illa Neeyum was released on February 20, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaarai Polum Illa Neeyum, the listener is taken on a melodic journey that encapsulates the innocence and joy of young love. The song beautifully conveys the emotions of connection and longing, making it a memorable piece in the film Pencil. With GV Prakash Kumar's soulful rendition, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and happiness. This track serves as a perfect backdrop for romantic moments, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaarai Polum Illa Neeyum from Pencil captures the essence of youthful romance with GV Prakash Kumar's enchanting vocals. The song's melodic charm and heartfelt lyrics resonate deeply, making it a perfect anthem for love. Dive into this beautiful track that beautifully blends emotion and melody, leaving listeners yearning for more.
stanzaMeanings: We are all alone, and we have met on a day when everyone is together. Why did we lose that?
I saw you going far away, but did you see me next to you?
We are watching and smiling together, moving along. All those sights are beautiful dreams.
The street where you went, I have stood there many days. Your head that won't return will bring some flowers.
I started with the clouds, I searched for you, and I got lost.
The eyes that shine brightly are dancing in dreams. You are...
In the time when you are not here, my thorny heart is restless. Looking at me, even a single word is enough.
I long for the days of freedom. I need to see you every day...
Will you forget what you saw just once?
We are all alone, and we have met on a day when everyone is together. Why did we lose that?
I saw you going far away, but did you see me next to you?
We are watching and smiling together, moving along. All those sights are beautiful dreams.
